textByHash.0db0cc07781d894eb730e42d8dc61432118680b3: Nonsense! It would have been foolish to try and deal with this yourself! Now, get yourself over to Elder Raley's at once!
textByHash.f9d3fd96747fada6092ee833bb29006da586de3a: Ah, human. I take it we have you to thank for getting Floopa to us?
textByHash.e84e22be9ded3b71d0d7bb773059eb96e93fb013: That's not surprising, but it's good that she did. She would have been unlikely to survive that injury on her own.
textByHash.960921f49ae46dc6955f12edc8444f59bd7e7626: She will survive. With Elder Raley looking after her, I have no doubt of that. However, it is a nasty wound, and much of the damage will be permanent. Did she say how it happened?
textByHash.3eb2d3db320712c650ccfe21a06dc78e34883baf: I see. Well, thank you for helping her, human. Now, I've no doubt you have plenty to be doing. You should be on your way.
textByHash.a3ce862ab5148671c0201d8c91e535714a5a1179: Don't take this the wrong way, human, but as you may have worked out from Floopa, we tortugans aren't always the biggest fans of company. We generally don't allow humans on the Conch.
textByHash.0697313367ad999f60925b7feda096e4465bce87: I suppose it is within my right to invite you to remain here for a short time as what we call a tourist. It will allow you to stay on the island while Floopa recovers.
textByHash.f541bf3320d57f780ebf71643d85c9c183dbf0c4: However, you should be aware that the only way to permanently remain on the Conch is to undergo our Trial by Water and become an honorary tortugan.
textByHash.ad4c3bc2ea2f69e14e9fd390e59eac8e86adba66: Very well. I will see that it is done. Now, if you'd like to check in on Floopa, you'll find her at Elder Raley's home. It's the first one on the right as you head into town.
textByHash.6b1abfa156c6f925bf8ab63e0b9804049ed1bde0: Hello again, human. If you'd like to check in on Floopa, you'll find her at Elder Raley's home. It's the first one on the right as you head into town.
textByHash.165a96b84e567734860c3fda77af386775db1929: Hello again, human. I have finished making arrangements for you to remain on the island as a tourist until Floopa recovers.
textByHash.eef22d7ebf727adbdc86cb59fb1b0a5d81acacdd: ... holding it at bay, but they need support quick!
textByHash.495a8e5781897f99c479f7b51450663234bbc49a: I'm heading over right away. The eggs must be protected!
textByHash.991b2286ddeeb57eb86bf29583871e92a020d5bb: Join me, human! Sail to the Little Pearl as fast as you can and help protect our eggs!
textByHash.658bef26bdf520bc911286ab1c5bb71df05b4735: Yes, make sure you speak to Elder Blunn outside first. He can sort you out with a suitable shield.
textByHash.14c11ea8f60fea351fd97d4031d3e1cd1398e01c: I will meet you there, human.
textByHash.d1b543f95b0d3e8c5fbb3b1635437ba2850c3e05: Quickly, human! You need to sail to the Little Pearl, south east of the Conch. I will meet you there. Oh, and don't forget to pick up a shield from Elder Blunn outside!
textByHash.0413b4a919226eca1514bc0bea3b4d95ff484083: Excellent work! The beast is well and truly dead!
textByHash.4e3ba377a54259db9b576d8b383f0806bc1d33e6: As good as can be expected. We lost a fair few, but it could have been much worse.
textByHash.f83468ab575ccac924d5abbd47af7589b637072f: Even without a gryphon involved, not all eggs make it. It is an unfortunate reality of life. You need not apologise.
textByHash.e6d895ca00fa1b7b42a9db8270e887a67d47fe1a: Now, I need to get to work on finding out how this happened. To our knowledge, no gryphon has ever travelled this far from the Conch before.
textByHash.023bc54849b2ce9ea04ae0113cdfd8676c4e5ad0: A ship with red sails? Curious... and concerning... Hmm...
textByHash.78a4a3aa8cb4097946ca948a37d450450d9e1a44: You should return to Raley and Floopa on the Conch, human. Tell them what you have told me. See if they can make any sense of it.
textByHash.fc0dad149dd105e47f0f6ecde97b61625a5fbe04: You should return to Raley and Floopa on the Conch, human. Tell them what you told me about that ship with the red sails. See if they can make any sense of it.
textByHash.5b4ff627fa1df98c0dc51d7a1157050712f72a85: I'm afraid not. I heard that Floopa might have an idea about that ship you saw. We will have to hope she is able to come up with something.
textByHash.c6ecb6828798457479c6aeaefc0cdce2e367da0f: In the meantime, I will remain here. The others may need support if another gryphon attacks. Until next time, human.
